message:
feat(init): wire sync.git-remote config into bd init for auto-bootstrap

When sync.git-remote is configured in config.yaml, bd init now
automatically clones the Dolt database from the git remote and
configures the remote in the store so bd dolt push/pull work
immediately. This enables the new-machine bootstrap story.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
